title: Shared frontmatter utility and path resolution migration
purpose: Extract the duplicated split_frontmatter into a shared utility and migrate path resolution from norn-cli into libnorn. These are cross-cutting prerequisites: every other norn-config brief needs paths, and the skills, rules, and profile clusters all need frontmatter parsing. Landing this first unblocks all four downstream clusters.
task: Create norn::util::frontmatter with a shared split_frontmatter function and FrontmatterError enum. Update profile/loader.rs and rules/parser.rs to delegate to the shared implementation. Create norn::config::paths with norn_dir(), profiles_dir(), session_data_dir(), and settings_file() migrated from norn-cli. Update norn-cli to delegate to the new paths. Fix the REPL history path to honour NORN_HOME. Remove the unused config_dir() helper.

requirements.title: Shared frontmatter utility
requirements.spec: The norn crate SHALL provide a shared split_frontmatter function in norn::util::frontmatter that splits markdown content at YAML frontmatter delimiters (---). The function SHALL return the YAML section and the body section as borrowed string slices. It SHALL NOT allocate when the input is well-formed.
acceptance: norn/src/util/mod.rs exists with pub mod frontmatter
norn/src/util/frontmatter.rs exports split_frontmatter and FrontmatterError
split_frontmatter returns Result<(&str, &str), FrontmatterError>
FrontmatterError has MissingOpening and MissingClosing variants
Handles CRLF line endings
Empty body after closing --- returns empty &str
Empty YAML between --- delimiters returns empty &str
norn/src/lib.rs declares pub mod util

requirements.title: Profile loader delegates to shared frontmatter
requirements.spec: profile/loader.rs SHALL delegate to norn::util::frontmatter::split_frontmatter and map FrontmatterError to ConfigError. The local split_frontmatter function SHALL be removed.
acceptance: profile/loader.rs imports norn::util::frontmatter::split_frontmatter
No split_frontmatter function definition remains in profile/loader.rs
FrontmatterError mapped to ConfigError::InvalidConfig
All existing profile/loader.rs tests pass unchanged

requirements.title: Rules parser delegates to shared frontmatter
requirements.spec: rules/parser.rs SHALL delegate to norn::util::frontmatter::split_frontmatter and map FrontmatterError to RulesError. The local split_front_matter function SHALL be removed.
acceptance: rules/parser.rs imports norn::util::frontmatter::split_frontmatter
No split_front_matter function definition remains in rules/parser.rs
FrontmatterError mapped to RulesError::ParseFailed
All existing rules/parser.rs tests pass unchanged

requirements.title: Path resolution in libnorn
requirements.spec: norn::config::paths SHALL provide norn_dir(), profiles_dir(), session_data_dir(), and settings_file() functions that resolve paths under ~/.norn/ with NORN_HOME override support. All functions SHALL return Option<PathBuf> (no panics).
acceptance: norn/src/config/mod.rs exists with pub mod paths
norn/src/config/paths.rs exports norn_dir, profiles_dir, session_data_dir, settings_file
norn_dir() honours NORN_HOME env var when set and non-empty
norn_dir() falls back to dirs::home_dir().join('.norn')
norn_dir() returns None when neither NORN_HOME nor home_dir resolves
profiles_dir() returns norn_dir()/profiles/
session_data_dir() returns Option<PathBuf>, not a panic
settings_file() returns norn_dir()/settings.json
norn/src/lib.rs declares pub mod config

requirements.title: norn-cli delegates to libnorn paths
requirements.spec: norn-cli/src/config/paths.rs SHALL delegate all path resolution to norn::config::paths. The local implementations of norn_dir(), profiles_dir(), and session_data_dir() SHALL become thin wrappers or re-exports.
acceptance: norn-cli paths.rs imports from norn::config::paths
norn_dir() delegates to norn::config::paths::norn_dir()
profiles_dir() delegates to norn::config::paths::profiles_dir()
session_data_dir() delegates to norn::config::paths::session_data_dir()
NORN_HOME constant removed from norn-cli paths.rs (lives in norn::config::paths)
All existing norn-cli paths.rs tests pass

requirements.title: REPL history honours NORN_HOME
requirements.spec: REPL history_file_path() SHALL use norn::config::paths::norn_dir() instead of hardcoding dirs::home_dir().join('.norn'). It SHALL return Option<PathBuf> to handle the case where norn_dir() returns None.
acceptance: history_file_path() imports norn::config::paths::norn_dir
history_file_path() returns Option<PathBuf>
No direct call to dirs::home_dir() remains in history.rs
Setting NORN_HOME changes the history file location

requirements.title: Remove unused config_dir helper
requirements.spec: config_dir() and CONFIG_SUBDIR SHALL be removed from norn-cli paths.rs. No code references them.
acceptance: No config_dir() function in norn-cli paths.rs
No CONFIG_SUBDIR constant in norn-cli paths.rs
No references to config_dir in the workspace (grep confirms)
cargo check -p norn-cli passes

boundaries: SHALL NOT modify the Profile struct or profile loading logic beyond swapping the frontmatter call
SHALL NOT modify the Rule struct or rule parsing logic beyond swapping the frontmatter call
SHALL NOT create settings types or loader logic — that is NC-002 and NC-003
SHALL NOT modify builder.rs — that is NC-004
verification: cargo test -p norn -p norn-cli — all tests pass
cargo clippy -p norn -p norn-cli -- -D warnings clean
grep -r 'fn split_frontmatter\|fn split_front_matter' crates/norn/src/ returns only util/frontmatter.rs
No file exceeds 500 lines of code (excluding tests, comments, whitespace)
